local_names.hi: आयुष्मान भारत पीएम-जय सेहत (जम्मू और कश्मीर)
local_names.bn: আয়ুষ্মান ভারত পিএম-জে সেহত (জম্মু ও কাশ্মীর)
local_names.mr: आयुष्मान भारत पीएम-जय सेहत (जम्मू आणि काश्मीर)
local_names.gu: આયુષ્માન ભારત પીએમ-જે સેહત (જમ્મુ અને કાશ્મીર)
local_names.kn: ಆಯುಷ್ಮಾನ್ ಭಾರತ್ ಪಿಎಂ-ಜೆ ಸೆಹತ್ (ಜಮ್ಮು ಮತ್ತು ಕಾಶ್ಮೀರ)
local_names.pa: ਆਯੁਸ਼ਮਾਨ ਭਾਰਤ ਪੀਐਮ-ਜੇ ਸੇਹਤ (ਜੰਮੂ ਅਤੇ ਕਸ਼ਮੀਰ)
local_names.or: ଆୟୁଷ୍ମାନ ଭାରତ ପିଏମ-ଜେ ସେହତ (ଜମ୍ମୁ ଓ କାଶ୍ମୀର)

income_thresholds.description: UNIVERSAL COVERAGE — NO income criteria. ALL residents of Jammu & Kashmir are eligible regardless of income, caste, or occupation. SEHAT extends PM-JAY universally to the entire population of J&K.
income_thresholds.source: J&K UT Administration / SEHAT Portal / PM-JAY NHA

exclusion_rules.description: Only residents of Jammu & Kashmir UT are eligible. Must have valid J&K domicile or residence proof.
Families covered under CGHS (Central Government Health Scheme) are excluded to avoid duplication

family_criteria.family_definition: Family as per ration card or Aadhaar-linked family unit in J&K. All members are covered. Coverage is floater across all family members. No cap on family size.

covered_procedures: Diagnostics and lab tests during hospitalization

required_documents.name: Aadhaar Card
required_documents.notes: Required for e-KYC verification at empanelled hospital or CSC

required_documents.name: J&K Domicile Certificate / Residence Proof
required_documents.notes: Must prove residency in Jammu & Kashmir. Ration card, voter ID, or domicile certificate accepted.

required_documents.name: Mobile Number
required_documents.notes: Linked to Aadhaar for OTP-based verification

required_documents.name: Family Photo
required_documents.notes: Required for new SEHAT/Ayushman card generation

enrollment_steps: Step 1: Check eligibility at sehatjk.nic.in or pmjay.gov.in with Aadhaar number
Step 2: Visit nearest CSC or empanelled hospital with Aadhaar and J&K residence proof
Step 3: Complete e-KYC verification (Aadhaar biometric or OTP)
Step 4: Operator verifies J&K residency in the SEHAT portal
Step 5: Family photograph taken and uploaded
Step 6: SEHAT / Ayushman card (Golden Card) generated and printed
Step 7: Card valid immediately; present at any empanelled hospital in J&K or across India for cashless treatment up to Rs 5 lakh
description_for_embedding: AB-PMJAY SEHAT is Jammu & Kashmir's universal health insurance scheme that extends PM-JAY coverage to ALL residents of J&K regardless of income, occupation, or caste. SEHAT stands for Social, Endeavour for Health and Telemedicine. Launched on December 26, 2020, it provides Rs 5 lakh per family per year for hospitalization at empanelled hospitals. Unlike standard PM-JAY which covers only SECC families, SEHAT is universal — every J&K resident is eligible. Covers 1,393 medical packages across 26 specialties. Cards are valid across India at PM-JAY empanelled hospitals. Enrollment via sehatjk.nic.in or CSC. Helpline 14555.
